Abstract
Ayurveda is a traditional system of medicine that has been practiced for thousands of years.
Introduction
Ashwagandha is an important herb. Triphala churna is used for digestion. The introduction explains these concepts clearly to the reader. Brahmi and tulsi are commonly used in formulations. They have various therapeutic properties and are widely studied.
References
1. Smith et al.
2. Doe et al.
